briefdescription.para: Define an Event monitor to receive notifications in the system workqueue thread.

parameterdescription.para: Optional monitor initial state (PAUSED or ACTIVE). The default initial state of a monitor is active.

briefdescription.para: Register a callback structure for GNSS auxiliary data published.
Register a callback structure for GNSS auxiliary data published.

detaileddescription.para: Supported radio access technology modes for HL78xx modem

briefdescription.para: SIM and modem powered off (minimum functionality)

detaileddescription.para: AT+CFUN command modes for controlling modem operational state

briefdescription.para: Module is ready to receive commands for the TE.

detaileddescription.para: No access code is required.

briefdescription.para: Module is waiting for an access code.

detaileddescription.para: Use AT+CPIN? to determine it.
Status codes returned by AT+CPIN? indicating SIM and module state
Types of modem information that can be queried

briefdescription.para: 0x01 — NMEA frames are output on dedicated NMEA port over USB
0x03 — NMEA frames are output on UART1
0x04 — NMEA frames are output on the same port the +GNSSNMEA was received on
0x05 — NMEA frames are output on CMUX DLC1
0x06 — NMEA frames are output on CMUX DLC2
0x07 — NMEA frames are output on CMUX DLC3
0x08 — NMEA frames are output on CMUX DLC4

detaileddescription.para: Port selection for GNSS NMEA sentence output from the modem

briefdescription.para: Data is not valid (read) / Delete data (write)

detaileddescription.para: Mode value returned by AT+GNSSAD? read command or used by write command

briefdescription.para: Request 1 day of A-GNSS assistance data.
Request 2 days of A-GNSS assistance data.
Request 3 days of A-GNSS assistance data.
Request 7 days of A-GNSS assistance data.
Request 14 days of A-GNSS assistance data.
Request 28 days of A-GNSS assistance data.
Number of days of predicted assistance data to download (write command) or number of days before it expires (read command)

detaileddescription.para: Only these values are accepted by the AT+GNSSAD=1,<days> command
Asynchronous event notifications from the HL78xx modem

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* hl78xx_gnss_aux_data_callback_t) (const struct device *dev, const struct hl78xx_gnss_nmea_aux_data *aux_data, uint16_t size)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct hl78xx_gnss_nmea_aux_data *aux_data, uint16_t size)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_gnss_aux_data_callback_t

briefdescription.para: GNSS auxiliary data callback function type.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to auxiliary NMEA data structure

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* hl78xx_api_configure_networks) (const struct device *dev, const struct hl78xx_network *networks, uint8_t size)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct hl78xx_network *networks, uint8_t size)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_configure_networks

briefdescription.para: API function pointer for configuring networks.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on failure

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* hl78xx_api_get_supported_networks) (const struct device *dev, const struct hl78xx_network **networks, uint8_t *size)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const struct hl78xx_network **networks, uint8_t *size)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_get_supported_networks

briefdescription.para: API function pointer for getting supported networks.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on failure

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* hl78xx_api_get_signal) (const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_signal_type type, int16_t *value)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_signal_type type, int16_t *value)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_get_signal

briefdescription.para: API for getting network signal strength.

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* hl78xx_api_get_modem_info) (const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_modem_info_type type, char *info, size_t size)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_modem_info_type type, char *info, size_t size)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_get_modem_info

briefdescription.para: API function pointer for getting modem information.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on failure

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* hl78xx_api_get_registration_status) (const struct device *dev, enum cellular_access_technology tech, enum cellular_registration_status *status)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, enum cellular_access_technology tech, enum cellular_registration_status *status)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_get_registration_status

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* hl78xx_api_set_phone_functionality) (const struct device *dev, enum hl78xx_phone_functionality functionality, bool reset)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, enum hl78xx_phone_functionality functionality, bool reset)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_set_phone_functionality

briefdescription.para: API function pointer for setting phone functionality.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on failure

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* hl78xx_api_get_phone_functionality) (const struct device *dev, enum hl78xx_phone_functionality *functionality)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, enum hl78xx_phone_functionality *functionality)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_get_phone_functionality

memberdef.definition: typedef int(* hl78xx_api_send_at_cmd) (const struct device *dev, const char *cmd, uint16_t cmd_size, const struct modem_chat_match *response_matches, uint16_t matches_size)
memberdef.argsstring: )(const struct device *dev, const char *cmd, uint16_t cmd_size, const struct modem_chat_match *response_matches, uint16_t matches_size)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_send_at_cmd

memberdef.argsstring: )(struct hl78xx_evt *notif)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_evt_monitor_dispatcher_t

detaileddescription.para: Called to dispatch events to registered monitors

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* hl78xx_evt_monitor_handler_t) (struct hl78xx_evt *notif, struct hl78xx_evt_monitor_entry *mon)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct hl78xx_evt *notif, struct hl78xx_evt_monitor_entry *mon)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_evt_monitor_handler_t

detaileddescription.para: User callback for receiving event notifications

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the monitor entry that received the event

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum hl78xx_phone_functionality functionality, bool reset)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_func_set_phone_functionality

detaileddescription.para: Internal function to set the modem's phone functionality mode. Users should call hl78xx_set_phone_functionality() instead.

parameterdescription.para: If true, the modem will be reset as part of applying the functionality change.

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, negative errno on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum hl78xx_phone_functionality *functionality)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_func_get_phone_functionality

detaileddescription.para: Internal function to query the modem's phone functionality mode. Users should call hl78xx_get_phone_functionality() instead.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to store the current phone functionality mode

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, negative errno on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const enum cellular_signal_type type, int16_t *value)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_func_get_signal

detaileddescription.para: Internal function to retrieve cellular signal strength metrics. Users should use the standard cellular API instead.

parameterdescription.para: Type of the signal to retrieve (RSSI, RSRP, RSRQ, etc.)
Pointer to store the signal value

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, negative errno on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum hl78xx_modem_info_type type, void *info, size_t size)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_func_get_modem_info_vendor

detaileddescription.para: Internal function to retrieve HL78xx-specific modem information. Users should call hl78xx_get_modem_info() instead.

parameterdescription.para: Type of the modem info to retrieve
Pointer to store the modem info

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, negative errno on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const char *cmd, uint16_t cmd_size, const struct modem_chat_match *response_matches, uint16_t matches_size)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_api_func_modem_dynamic_cmd_send

detaileddescription.para: Internal function to send arbitrary AT commands to the modem. Users should call hl78xx_modem_cmd_send() instead.

simplesect.para: 0 if successful, negative errno on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const enum hl78xx_modem_info_type type, void *info, size_t size)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_get_modem_info

briefdescription.para: Get modem info for the device.

parameterdescription.para: Type of the modem info requested
if API is not supported by cellular network device.
if modem does not provide info requested

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum hl78xx_phone_functionality functionality, bool reset)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_set_phone_functionality

briefdescription.para: Set the modem phone functionality mode.

detaileddescription.para: Configures the operational state of the modem (e.g., full, airplane, or minimum functionality). Optionally, the modem can be reset during this transition.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the modem device instance.
Desired phone functionality mode to be set. (e.g., full, airplane, minimum – see enum hl78xx_phone_functionality)
If true, the modem will be reset as part of applying the functionality change.
if an invalid parameter is passed.
on communication or command failure with the modem.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, enum hl78xx_phone_functionality *functionality)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_get_phone_functionality

briefdescription.para: Get the current phone functionality mode of the modem.

detaileddescription.para: Queries the modem to retrieve its current operational mode, such as full functionality, airplane mode, or minimum functionality.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the modem device instance.
Pointer to store the retrieved functionality mode. (see enum hl78xx_phone_functionality)
if the input parameters are invalid.
if the modem fails to respond or returns an error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, const char *cmd, uint16_t cmd_size, const struct modem_chat_match *response_matches, uint16_t matches_size)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_modem_cmd_send

briefdescription.para: Send an AT command to the modem and wait for a matched response.

detaileddescription.para: Transmits the specified AT command to the modem and waits for a response that matches one of the expected patterns defined in the response match table.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the modem device instance.
Pointer to the AT command string to be sent.
Length of the AT command string in bytes.
Pointer to an array of expected response patterns. (see struct modem_chat_match)
Number of response patterns in the array.
on successful command transmission and response match.
if the modem did not respond in the expected time.
on communication failure or if response did not match.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t rssi, int16_t *value)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_parse_rssi

briefdescription.para: Convert raw RSSI value from the modem to dBm.

detaileddescription.para: Parses the RSSI value reported by the modem (typically from an AT command response) and converts it to a corresponding signal strength in dBm, as defined by 3GPP TS 27.007.

parameterdescription.para: Raw RSSI value (0–31 or 99 for not known or not detectable).
Pointer to store the converted RSSI in dBm.
if the RSSI value is out of valid range or unsupported.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t rsrp, int16_t *value)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_parse_rsrp

briefdescription.para: Convert raw RSRP value from the modem to dBm.

detaileddescription.para: Parses the Reference Signal Received Power (RSRP) value reported by the modem and converts it into a corresponding signal strength in dBm, typically based on 3GPP TS 36.133 specifications.

parameterdescription.para: Raw RSRP value (commonly in the range 0–97, or 255 if unknown).
Pointer to store the converted RSRP in dBm.
if the RSRP value is out of range or represents an unknown value.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t rsrq, int16_t *value)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_parse_rsrq

briefdescription.para: Convert raw RSRQ value from the modem to dB.

detaileddescription.para: Parses the Reference Signal Received Quality (RSRQ) value provided by the modem and converts it into a signal quality measurement in decibels (dB), as specified by 3GPP TS 36.133.

parameterdescription.para: Raw RSRQ value (typically 0–34, or 255 if unknown).
Pointer to store the converted RSRQ in dB.
if the RSRQ value is out of valid range or indicates unknown.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct hl78xx_evt_monitor_entry *mon)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_evt_monitor_pause

detaileddescription.para: Pause monitor mon from receiving notifications.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct hl78xx_evt_monitor_entry *mon)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_evt_monitor_resume

detaileddescription.para: Resume forwarding notifications to monitor mon.

memberdef.argsstring: (hl78xx_evt_monitor_dispatcher_t handler)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_evt_notif_handler_set

briefdescription.para: Set the event notification handler for HL78xx modem events.

detaileddescription.para: Registers a callback handler to receive asynchronous event notifications from the HL78xx modem, such as network registration changes, GNSS updates, or other modem-generated events.

parameterdescription.para: Function pointer to the event monitor callback. Pass NULL to clear the existing handler.
if the handler parameter is invalid.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct hl78xx_evt_monitor_entry *mon)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_evt_monitor_register

briefdescription.para: Register an event monitor to receive HL78xx modem event notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Adds a monitor to the list of registered event monitors. Once registered, the monitor will receive all modem events unless paused.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the monitor entry to register

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (struct hl78xx_evt_monitor_entry *mon)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_evt_monitor_unregister

briefdescription.para: Unregister an event monitor from receiving HL78xx modem event notifications.

detaileddescription.para: Removes a monitor from the list of registered event monitors.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the monitor entry to unregister

simplesect.para: 0 on success, negative errno on failure

memberdef.argsstring: (enum hl78xx_cell_rat_mode rat_mode)
memberdef.name: hl78xx_rat_to_access_tech

briefdescription.para: Convert HL78xx RAT mode to standard cellular API.

detaileddescription.para: Maps HL78xx-specific radio access technology enum to the standard Zephyr cellular API access technology enum.
